name: Login with valid credentials redirects to dashboard
description: A returning user enters their email and password on the login page, submits the form, and is redirected to the app dashboard showing their stats.

planSteps.description: Enter a valid email address in the email field
Enter a valid password in the password field
Click the sign-in button to submit the login form
Verify the page redirects to the app dashboard showing a heading or stats panel with cards due count, XP, or level information
